SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.

A part of the Northwest Quarter of Section 5, Township 17 North, Range 3 East,
Hamilton County, Indiana, described as follows:

Beginning at the Point of Beginning;

thence North 10 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 200.00 feet;
thence Northeasterly along a curve to the right having a radius of 350.00
feet, an arc length of 162.41 feet, and a chord bearing North 23 degrees 17
minutes 30 seconds East, 161.02 feet;
thence South 56 degrees 35 minutes 00 seconds East, 175.00 feet;
thence South 33 degrees 25 minutes 00 seconds West, 400.00 feet to the Point
of Beginning.
